exploration_notes: Identified the complete S3 authentication flow in RGW. The auth chain starts at RGWHandler_REST_S3::authorize (rgw_rest_s3.cc:5739), which calls into the AWSAuthStrategy containing STS, External, and Local engines. discover_aws_flavour() (rgw_rest_s3.cc:5759) routes between V2 and V4 signatures. Key security-relevant findings identified: (1) Signature comparison uses std::string::compare() (rgw_rest_s3.cc:7067,7271) which is NOT constant-time, enabling timing attacks; (2) AWS Signature V2 is sti
